Name: Fifine D6 Starter
Description: Starter plugin for Fifine D6: counter and open URL actions

com.fifine.d6.starter.counter.Name: Counter
com.fifine.d6.starter.counter.Tooltip: Increments a number on each key press

com.fifine.d6.starter.openurl.Name: Open URL
com.fifine.d6.starter.openurl.Tooltip: Opens the configured URL in your browser
